title: ToolTreaux Artist Paint Brushes Natural Hair Bristles Wooden Grip Assorted 15pc
description:
The ToolTreaux artist’s brushes come in 15 assorted sizes and styles so you can paint to your heart’s desire! They range from 7” to 10” in length and will easily fit inside most tool boxes or paint sets. Each brush tip features natural hair bristles which are great for watercolor and oil painting. With this assortment of brushes, you’ll be ready to create your next artistic masterpiece. Our brushes are constructed of high-quality, durable wooden handles that have colored tips for a decorative look. They are comfortable to paint with and are easy to control, ensuring that your artwork comes out as you intend it to. The ToolTreaux brushes are suitable for use with paint as well as adhesives, glues, and more, making this an essential set of brushes for all sorts of arts and crafts projects!
